capsules.description: First entry is this host domain's own capsule; additional entries MAY describe mirrored origin domains.

protocol_versions.description: Protocol versions supported by this domain (e.g. ["v1"]).

capsule_signature.description: Signature over the capsules array, verified with capsules[0].key

uri.description: Domain URI of the capsule origin: cmn://{origin_domain}

key.description: Ed25519 public key of the entry's origin domain in {algorithm}.{base58} format

previous_keys.description: Retired keys for verifying historical content signed before key rotation. Empty array if no key rotation has occurred.

endpoints.description: Typed array of endpoint definitions. Taste-only domains provide only a taste endpoint.

key.description: Retired Ed25519 public key in {algorithm}.{base58} format

retired_at_epoch_ms.description: When this key was retired (milliseconds since Unix epoch)

archive_format.description: Archive transport format identifier. Clients MUST select decoders by this field, not by filename suffix.

endpoint_type.description: Endpoint type identifier (e.g., mycelium, spore, archive, taste)

protocol_version.description: Protocol version this endpoint serves (e.g. "v1"). Defaults to "v1" when absent.

url.description: Template URL for fetching mycelium, e.g. https://example.com/cmn/mycelium/{hash}.json

hash.description: Content hash of the primary mycelium manifest. Authoritative source for domain metadata (name, bio, nutrients) and featured spores. Used for change detection and display.

hashes.description: Optional additional mycelium shard hashes for large domains. Each points to an overflow shard whose spore list is merged for search and indexing. Metadata from these shards is ignored — only the primary hash is authoritative.

url.description: Template URL for fetching spores, e.g. https://example.com/cmn/spore/{hash}.json
Template URL for archives. MUST include {hash}, e.g. https://example.com/cmn/archive/{hash}.tar.zst

format.description: Archive format identifier, e.g. tar+zstd or tar+gzip

delta_url.description: Optional template URL for archive deltas. MUST include {hash} (target) and {old_hash} (cached base). Direction is old_hash -> hash.

url.description: Template URL for fetching taste reports, e.g. https://example.com/cmn/taste/{hash}.json
Template URL for this endpoint type

endpoints.description: Typed array of endpoint definitions. Each entry has a 'type' field. Multiple archive entries with different formats are allowed. Clients SHOULD try entries in listed order.
